case_title: FIORENTINI, KATHLEEN VS ELLIS O'FARRELL GARAGE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIS O'FARRELL GARAGE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,280.00 FILED BY FIORENTINI, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIS O'FARRELL GARAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIORENTINI, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLIS O'FARRELL GARAGE $799.27 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $819.27, DEFENDANT, RASHAD AHMED IS DISMISSED AS AN INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
